info.title: CaféMP
info.author: whateveritwas
info.description: Experimental Media Player for the Nintendo Wii U
info.details: CaféMP is a lightweight, open-source media player for the Wii U, focused on basic media playback from the SD card. It supports most common video and audio formats, targeting up to 720p at 30 FPS.\n\nThis is a work-in-progress—expect occasional crashes, stutters, or other instability. I'm not a specialist in FFmpeg, Wii U homebrew, or C++.

changelog:
v0.5.1

What's new:
- Support for Tiramisu cfw
- Animated gifs
- General stability improvements

v0.5.0

What's new:
- New Ui
- Photo viewer
- Update Toolchain
- Video / Audio player hud updates
- Changing between multiple audio tracks in a video

v0.4.6

This update includes various UI fixes and backend improvements.
There is now also support for skipping in audio files and BASIC support for the pro controller!

v0.4.5

Fixed audio buffers not clearing on startup when background music is disabled

v0.4.1

Minor ui changes and rendering speed up

v0.4.0

Added simple audio player and updated player HUD.

v0.3.2

Added contoller ui navigation ans splash screen

v0.3.1

Added startup sound when loading from Wii U menu and ambiance music (https://freesound.org/people/LightMister/sounds/769925/) when in cafe mp main menu.

v0.3.0

Cafemp is now multi threaded meaning better video playback capabilities. Maybe up to 720p@30fps. But it works!

v0.2.0

New UI and support for most file types like mp4, mov, mkv ,avi

v0.1.0

Added frameskip and icon
